title: Osaka Hwansangseon
titleNative: 오사카 환상선
synopsis: Kim Yong, a Zainichi Korean boy from Osaka, accidentally gets caught up in a fight with the nephew of a yakuza. Kim Yong is given the mission of infiltrating a Korean village and stealing an ID card by order of the yakuza. The villagers, who seemed ordinary, seem to be up to something... At first, he only thought of completing the mission and receiving money, but Kim Yong gradually becomes one with the villagers and joins the village's goal of 'establishing a homeland in Osaka. (Source: Naver, translated)

title: Seishiki ni Majo ni Natta Nidome no Akuyaku Oujo wa, Mou Futatabi to Taisetsu na Mono wo Ushinawanai to Kokoro ni Chikau @COMIC
titleRomaji: Seishiki ni Majo ni Natta Nidome no Akuyaku Oujo wa, Mou Futatabi to Taisetsu na Mono wo Ushinawanai to Kokoro ni Chikau @COMIC
titleNative: 正式に魔女になった二度目の悪役皇女は、もう二度と大切な者を失わないと心に誓う@COMIC
synopsis: Princess Alice, who was turned back to her 10-year-old self with the "witch's power" before she died, meets Theodore, a heretic (Nox). He is the most hated and shunned member of the Knights' Order, but for a girl who was killed because of her crimson hair, he is the only person who can share her loneliness! However, contrary to the rumors (of the past), she is intelligent and gets caught up in a battle over the right to inherit the throne...? "Would you like to become a witch's knight out of self-interest?" "That's a ridiculous invitation, I don't think you're a princess, is it?" A relife story of a figurehead princess and a lonely knight who finally meet, both of whom have "crimson"! (Source: TO Books, translated)

title: Zero no Majutsushi: S-Rank Yuusha Party wo Zenryoku de Support Shiteita noni Tsuihousareta Saikyou no Majutsushi wa Party Kyoufushou ni Natta node Zenryoku de Ohitori-sama Musou wo Hajimeru Koto ni Shimashita @COMIC
titleRomaji: Zero no Majutsushi: S-Rank Yuusha Party wo Zenryoku de Support Shiteita noni Tsuihousareta Saikyou no Majutsushi wa Party Kyoufushou ni Natta node Zenryoku de Ohitori-sama Musou wo Hajimeru Koto ni Shimashita @COMIC
titleNative: ゼロの魔術師～Sランク勇者パーティを全力でサポートしていたのに追放された最強の魔術師はパーティ恐怖症になったので全力でお一人様無双を始める事にしました～@COMIC
synonyms: Zero Magician: I Was Supporting the S-Rank Hero Party with All My Might. The Strongest Magician Who Was Exiled Developed a Fear of Parties. I Decided to Put All My Effort into Making Each Person Unique.
synopsis: Rude, a magician belonging to an S-rank party, is expelled from the group due to the selfish actions of the hero, Tran. Betrayed by his comrades and heartbroken, Rude abandons the town he had been staying in and sets out on a journey to the neighboring Roland Empire in search of a new home. While on his journey, he defeats a band of thieves attacking a slave caravan. Then, unexpectedly, a beast girl who should have been freed pleads, “Please... I want you to be my master!”...? The strongest mage, abandoned by his comrades, becomes unstoppable in his new home! The Ultimate Heroic Fantasy! (Source: TO Books, translated)
chapterSourceTitle: Zero no Majutsushi ~S-Rank Yuusha Party wo Zenryoku de Support Shiteita no ni Tsuihousareta Saikyou no Majutsushi wa Party Kyoufushou ni Natta no de Zenryoku de Ohitori-sama Musou wo Hajimeru Koto ni Shimashita~

title: Renai Fushin na Reijou wa Reikoku Kishi-sama no Dekiai ni Kizukanai

synopsis: One day, Countess Rosalie witnesses her lover, Hayden, cheating on her. Heartbroken, Rosalie becomes timid about love. However, she is then proposed to by the dashing future Marquis, Rufus…!? A school romance story between a love-challenged young lady and a notoriously cold knight! (Source: Flex Comics, translated)

title: Jigoku de Mesu ga Hikaru
titleNative: 地獄でメスがひかる
synopsis: Hiromi is mistreated by her family because of her naturally ugly appearance. Unable to bear her situation, she attempts to commit suicide, but is rescued in the nick of time by a genius doctor, Iwao Toshiaki, and is exposed to human kindness for the first time. However, Iwao is trying to use Hiromi's brain to enter the realm of the divine, which is inaccessible to humans... (Source: Kodansha, translated)

synopsis: Mizuki Miyahara was living her best life, working as a robotics engineer. Ever since she was a child, she had recurring dreams about a lady Leticia, who was falsely accused and executed. One day, she had the same dream as usual, and then she was killed in a traffic accident. She found herself reincarnated as a young Letitia, before her execution. In order to avoid the terrible fate from her dreams, she tries to make a new life. First of all, she must find a way to avoid an engagement with the crown prince, who may be the one behind the plot....... (Source: Hifumishobo, translated)

titleNative: 明日もいい日でありますように。～異世界で新しい家族ができました～三兄弟のほっこりご飯日記
synopsis: Three brothers—Yuito, Haruto, and Yuuma—lost their mother in a traffic accident and were taken in by their father (who lived apart from her), spending their days enduring unreasonable violence. Just when they were on the verge of despair, given no proper meals and having no relatives to rely on—they were caught in a landslide and all three were reincarnated together into an isekai. A passing adventurer, Thomas, protected the three who had collapsed by the roadside, and together with his wife Olivia, who runs the eatery "Olive Tree," they welcomed the three as a "new family"... A warm isekai slow life spun by the beloved three brothers begins! (Source: Earth Star Entertainment, translated)
searchTerms: Ashita mo Ii Hi de Arimasu You ni.: Isekai de Atarashii Kazoku ga Dekimashita - 3 Kyoudai no Hokkori Gohan Nikki

synopsis: "I love you so much I want to eat you." Naruo Yurie is a student who can see non-human "black figures." On the day he meets his Tokyo landlord, Taka Mitora, Naruo is attacked by the "black figure" but is saved by a white tiger. From that day on, mysterious incidents begin to occur around Naruo...!? This is a story of love and desire between a divine beast and a human. (Source: Kadokawa, translated)

title: Kubinashi Seirei-sama ni Kuchizuke wo
titleNative: 首なし精霊様に口づけを
synopsis: A deadly curse is slowly killing Teo, and none of the healers or magic users he's ever met have been able to help him - until one day, during his travels, he finds the natural spirit Arvahany. Arvahany hates humans and has secrets of his own, not the least of which is that he has lost a considerable part of his powers. Teo has something he wants, and so he binds him with a contract to save himself, promising Teo to break his curse at the end of it, as a reward. But will the two be able to save each other? It might be much harder than either of them thought...

title: Transformers Legends
titleNative: トランスフォーマーレジェンズ
synopsis: Starting off as 4koma and published online to promote the titular Transformers Legends toyline, with special Bonus Edition (出張版 Shutchōban) chapters of the comic packed with the toys themselves, it Initially showcased the misadventures of the Beast Wars cast re-imagined as adult Transformers fans, before eventually taking a more story-driven approach and attempting to connect all the entries of the Japanese Generation 1 anime and manga continuity into one storyline. Heavily marketed towards adult collectors and otaku in the face of the brand's dwindling popularity with children after TakaraTomy's largely unsuccessful first attempt in the mid-2000s, it attempted to change the image of the Transformers franchise, with much more "adult", often ecchi-filled humour and numerous references to fan culture. Ulltimately concluded when TakaraTomy began a brand unification with Hasbro starting with Power of the Primes, deciding to mainly sell Hasbro toys as is with minimal changes to packaging. It was eventually succeeded by the more action-oriented Generations Selects Special Comic promoting Hasbro and TakaraTomy's joint Generations Selects imprint. (Source: TFwiki, edited)
searchTerms: トランスフォーマーレジェンズ

synopsis: Rio and Yakumo are members of the idol group KEy, formed through an audition program. One day, while wishing to become closer to the cool Yakumo, an unexpected kiss completely changes their relationship! It turns out Yakumo was actually a super-devoted fan, absolutely obsessed and in love with Rio! Since confessing his feelings, Yakumo's romantic and lustful desires have only escalated. Seeing the special side he only shows him, Rio begins to waver between friendship and love... (Source: Overlap, translated) Note: Includes two extra chapters.
searchTerms: Kiss toka Koi toka, NG nano ni
キスとか恋とか、NGなのに

title: Usapyon
titleNative: うさぴょん
synopsis: One day, a mysterious creature calling itself "Usapyon" appears in the room of Soma, a college student leading an empty life. This being, which looks human but isn't, calls Soma "older brother" and forces him to play video games with it... Before he knows it, his room is filled with pink things!? Involving those around them, something that had been stagnant begins to move. A strange and cute cohabitation comedy! (Source: Shu-Cream, translated)

titleRomaji: Konyakusha ni Wasurerareta Watashi Ringoku no Koutaishi Denka to Gisou Konyaku suru Koto ni Narimashita (※Tadashi, Denka no Honmei wa Watashi Mitai desu!?)

synopsis: Leafe, the eldest daughter of a duke, is the reincarnation of the dark magician Laurie. In her previous life, she was feared as an evil woman of unparalleled wickedness and lived a solitary life. In this life, she has avoided loneliness and has successfully lived a smooth life surrounded by her family and fiancé. However, her younger sister Aria stole her fiancé and kicked her out of the house, returning her to a life of solitude. In order to attend Aria's engagement party and fight back, Leafe asks Oliver, the crown prince of a neighboring country, to be her partner. She thought this would be a one-off, but for some reason Oliver has asked her to marry him!? (Source: Kodansha, translated)

titleNative: 忘れられ姫
synopsis: Wasurerare Hime is the story of Anne Antoine, a girl who leaves no trace in anyone's memory. In Fuzan-Croix, a port town striving to rebuild after a great disaster, Laurent lives with his ailing wife Marie. Into their home comes a young girl by the name of Anne Antoine. Her route onward having been blocked, she is taken in for a while as a maid. However... (Source: Comic Natalie, translated)

One day, however, Hatsumi witnesses Hinaki kissing another member of the club and begins to feel unsettled. A sensitive BL between a senior who is always an substitute and a junior who is a regular. (Source: East Press, translated) Note: Includes one extra chapter.

title: Ju-Hui-ui Juwi
titleNative: 주희의 주위
synopsis: Min, who can see ghosts. And Ju-Hui, who was Min’s best friend since childhood. Min never saw ghosts when she was with Ju-Hui, and thanks to that, she grew up leading a normal life, but Ju-Hui passed away at a young age in a mysterious accident. Min was certain that was the case... but in high school, she reunites with Ju-Hui, who is very much alive. However, the Ju-Hui Min knew is nowhere to be found, and this Ju-Hui feels strangely different. (Source: Naver, translated)

title: The (Poisoned) Invincible Poison Magician
titleNative: （毒殺された）世界無双の毒魔法使い
synopsis: Londo Von Edward was born as the illegitimate child of a noble. Since he seemed to have no magical abilities his family considered him worthless. When he came of age at 15, his father, ordered him to drink poison so it would seem like he had committed suicide. Londo sees so other option than to drink the poison. However, instead of killing him, the poison causes a magic symbol to appear on his back and awakens his ability to use poison magic. Realizing that his life is not over yet, he uses his newfound power to make his escape from the family that cast him aside and start life anew. (Source: Mangamo)

title: Yuuyuu Jiteki.
titleNative: 遊遊じてき。
synopsis: Chihiro Suzuki, a serious and reserved college boy, meets Miyu Washio, an older girl with an incredibly positive attitude, while working at a convenience store near his new home. “Let’s make some happy memories right now!” Her unpredictable ideas for “fun” — and her wholehearted enjoyment of the moment — gradually transforms his dull and uneventful daily life. From their slightly offbeat conversations, an unexpected new chapter in their lives begins. This is a sweet and fresh coming-of-age romantic comedy that starts with “friendship”! (Source: NicoNico Seiga, translated)
